docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $565.00 FILED BY NAVARRO, GABRIELA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY NIGHTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED BETWEEN PARTIES, PRIOR TO THE HEARING. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ALBERT LEE--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
